message:
test(report): add no-mock bundle/report/redaction/telemetry integration test

Adds a comprehensive integration test that exercises the full pipeline
without mocks:

1. Writes a telemetry parquet file (audit table) via BatchedWriter
2. Redacts a secret using RedactionEngine with ExportProfile::Safe
3. Creates a bundle with BundleWriter containing summary, telemetry,
   and JSONL log artifacts
4. Reads back via BundleReader with checksum verification
5. Validates JSONL log schema (required fields: event, timestamp,
   phase, case_id, command, exit_code, duration_ms, artifacts)
6. Validates parquet schema matches the expected audit_schema
7. Generates an HTML report from the bundle and checks structure

This test catches integration failures that unit tests miss: schema
mismatches between telemetry writer and reader, redaction leaks into
bundle summaries, and report generation failures on real bundle data.

Adds dev-dependencies: arrow v53 (prettyprint), parquet v53
(zstd+snap+async), and pt-telemetry (path dep) for the test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
